accommodations.name: SASTRA University Guesthouse
accommodations.description: Comfortably located diagonally opposite the main campus, SASTRA Guest House offers 28 beautifully renovated rooms (22 AC and 6 non-AC). Each room is equipped with modern furniture, work amenities, Smart TVs, and high-speed Wi-Fi. Guests can enjoy cozy beds, 24/7 hot & cold water, ample parking, and an attached dining hall serving quality meals.

accommodations.name: Grace Vista
accommodations.description: Located 16 km from SASTRA University, Grace Vista blends modern luxury with Thanjavur's cultural charm. This premium 3-star boutique-style hotel offers thoughtfully designed rooms with modern furniture, Smart TVs, work amenities, and high-speed Wi-Fi for a comfortable and elegant stay.

accommodations.name: Hotel Parisutham
accommodations.description: Located 15.5 km from SASTRA University near the Old Bus Stand and Brihadeeswarar Temple, Hotel Parisutham offers luxuriously appointed rooms designed for comfort and tranquility. Guests can enjoy modern amenities, excellent service, and a peaceful atmosphere in a prime location.

accommodations.name: Tanjore Sangam
accommodations.description: Situated 15 km from SASTRA University near the Old Bus Stand and Big Temple, Sangam Hotel offers a blend of cultural experience and modern comfort. With dining options like 'Thillana' restaurant and 'Layam' bar, the hotel provides an ideal stay for exploring Thanjavur’s heritage, including temples and famous paintings.

accommodations.name: Hotel Gnanam
accommodations.description: Located 15 km from SASTRA University in Attar Mohalla, Hotel Gnanam offers a comfortable stay near Brihadeeswarar Temple and Royal Palace. Rooms feature air conditioning, private balconies/terraces, Wi-Fi, and modern amenities. Guests can enjoy vegetarian cuisine, room service, and a culturally rich neighborhood experience.

accommodations.name: Grand Ashok
accommodations.description: Part of Bergamont Hotels, Grand Ashok provides a comfortable and convenient stay near major pilgrimage sites. The hotel features modern rooms with Smart TVs, work amenities, and high-speed Wi-Fi. Guests also benefit from both vegetarian and non-vegetarian dining options within the same building.
